Items.Key: os command injection via admin console execute|command injection|cwe-78|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|604|609|adminconsole::execute_admin_command|``` 0604: string_utils::log_debug_message(command.c_str()); 0605: if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { 0606: std::string cmd = command.substr(5); 0607: std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; 0608: system(cmd.c_str()); 0609: } ```|allows an authenticated administrator to execute arbitrary shell commands supplied via the admin console.|input string starting with "exec" followed by a command.|validate and sanitize the command string, or replace `system()` with a safer api that does not invoke a shell. restrict allowed commands or use a command whitelist.

unbounded strcpy in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|833|supercalc::evaluate_expression|``` 0831: if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { 0832: strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); 0833: } else { ```|expressions longer than the 1024‑byte buffer can overwrite adjacent memory, leading to crashes or exploitation.|user inputs a very long expression.|use a safe copy that respects buffer bounds, e.g., `strncpy` or `std::string` with dynamic allocation.
